test_commands.python: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm python-tests pytest
test_commands.node: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm node-tests npx vitest run

fixes_applied: Created root requirements.txt and requirements-dev.txt (Dockerfile expected them at build context root)
Created frontend/vitest.config.ts (vitest test configuration was missing)
Created frontend/src/__tests__/smoke.test.ts (no test files existed for node runtime)
Created tests/test_smoke.py (no test files existed for python runtime)
Generated frontend/package-lock.json (required by npm ci in Dockerfile)
Added PYTHONPATH ENV to Dockerfile.test-python for service module resolution
Created services/gateway/apps/__init__.py (missing package init file broke Django app loading)
